title: Le Creuset 26 Cast Iron Dutch Oven – Cream / Ivory – Made in France
description:
Beautiful Le Creuset size 26 cast iron casserole in a classic cream/ivory color. Made in France and known for its exceptional heat distribution and durability.
✔ Diameter: 26 cm
✔ Original lid included
✔ Enamelled cast iron
✔ Suitable for all stovetops and oven
The pot is used and in good condition, with normal signs of use on the bottom (see photos). The interior and exterior enamel remain in good working condition.
Perfect for soups, stews, bread, slow cooking, and family meals.
